[Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 11/03/2021 • 4 minutes read. Ingrid Laane. Driven by the coronavirus crisis, media companies are making a rapid digital transformation. Shift to online. Consumers have been ‘stuck’ at home for almost a year, but the internet provides a virtual way out. As a result, data traffic has increased more strongly than in previous years, according to figures from the Amsterdam Internet Exchange (AMS-IX). This internet hub processed 35 per cent more data last year than the year before, while in 2019 growth was ‘only’ 17 per cent.

Shift to online. Consumers have been ‘stuck’ at home for almost a year, but the internet provides a virtual way out. As a result, data traffic has increased more strongly than in previous years, according to figures from the Amsterdam Internet Exchange (AMS-IX). This internet hub processed 35 per cent more data last year than the year before, while in 2019 growth was ‘only’ 17 per cent. The number of digital subscribers to newspapers benefited from this trend.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0010
text: Consumers have been ‘stuck’ at home for almost a year, but the internet provides a virtual way out. As a result, data traffic has increased more strongly than in previous years, according to figures from the Amsterdam Internet Exchange (AMS-IX). This internet hub processed 35 per cent more data last year than the year before, while in 2019 growth was ‘only’ 17 per cent. The number of digital subscribers to newspapers benefited from this trend. For example, the number of digital subscriptions at Mediahuis, publisher of NRC and De Telegraaf among others, rose by almost 50 per cent last year.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0011
text: As a result, data traffic has increased more strongly than in previous years, according to figures from the Amsterdam Internet Exchange (AMS-IX). This internet hub processed 35 per cent more data last year than the year before, while in 2019 growth was ‘only’ 17 per cent. The number of digital subscribers to newspapers benefited from this trend. For example, the number of digital subscriptions at Mediahuis, publisher of NRC and De Telegraaf among others, rose by almost 50 per cent last year. Led by new streaming services and demand for home entertainment due to the many hours spent at home, revenue growth in the Dutch market for TV and video services has also accelerated.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0011

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: This internet hub processed 35 per cent more data last year than the year before, while in 2019 growth was ‘only’ 17 per cent. The number of digital subscribers to newspapers benefited from this trend. For example, the number of digital subscriptions at Mediahuis, publisher of NRC and De Telegraaf among others, rose by almost 50 per cent last year. Led by new streaming services and demand for home entertainment due to the many hours spent at home, revenue growth in the Dutch market for TV and video services has also accelerated. While revenue from traditional pay TV remained the same, income from over-the-top video services in the third quarter of 2020 rose by 48 per cent compared with the year before.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0013
text: The number of digital subscribers to newspapers benefited from this trend. For example, the number of digital subscriptions at Mediahuis, publisher of NRC and De Telegraaf among others, rose by almost 50 per cent last year. Led by new streaming services and demand for home entertainment due to the many hours spent at home, revenue growth in the Dutch market for TV and video services has also accelerated. While revenue from traditional pay TV remained the same, income from over-the-top video services in the third quarter of 2020 rose by 48 per cent compared with the year before. Online shopping increased by almost 36 per cent.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0014
text: For example, the number of digital subscriptions at Mediahuis, publisher of NRC and De Telegraaf among others, rose by almost 50 per cent last year. Led by new streaming services and demand for home entertainment due to the many hours spent at home, revenue growth in the Dutch market for TV and video services has also accelerated. While revenue from traditional pay TV remained the same, income from over-the-top video services in the third quarter of 2020 rose by 48 per cent compared with the year before. Online shopping increased by almost 36 per cent. As a result, advertising campaigns are also shifting to the internet, where consumers are increasingly easy to reach.

text: Led by new streaming services and demand for home entertainment due to the many hours spent at home, revenue growth in the Dutch market for TV and video services has also accelerated. While revenue from traditional pay TV remained the same, income from over-the-top video services in the third quarter of 2020 rose by 48 per cent compared with the year before. Online shopping increased by almost 36 per cent. As a result, advertising campaigns are also shifting to the internet, where consumers are increasingly easy to reach. Momentum to strengthen digital propositions.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0015

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: While revenue from traditional pay TV remained the same, income from over-the-top video services in the third quarter of 2020 rose by 48 per cent compared with the year before. Online shopping increased by almost 36 per cent. As a result, advertising campaigns are also shifting to the internet, where consumers are increasingly easy to reach. Momentum to strengthen digital propositions. Media companies are using the current crisis to implement structural changes: less dependence on advertising income and more propositions that tap into increased digital consumption.

text: Online shopping increased by almost 36 per cent. As a result, advertising campaigns are also shifting to the internet, where consumers are increasingly easy to reach. Momentum to strengthen digital propositions. Media companies are using the current crisis to implement structural changes: less dependence on advertising income and more propositions that tap into increased digital consumption. For example, DPG Media in Belgium recently set up its own streaming platform, Streamz, to offer a local alternative to foreign streaming services.

For example, DPG Media in Belgium recently set up its own streaming platform, Streamz, to offer a local alternative to foreign streaming services. Media companies are also differentiating more in their subscription offering.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0019
text: Momentum to strengthen digital propositions. Media companies are using the current crisis to implement structural changes: less dependence on advertising income and more propositions that tap into increased digital consumption. For example, DPG Media in Belgium recently set up its own streaming platform, Streamz, to offer a local alternative to foreign streaming services. Media companies are also differentiating more in their subscription offering. For instance, Videoland now offers a cheaper package because it also contains advertising.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0020
text: Media companies are using the current crisis to implement structural changes: less dependence on advertising income and more propositions that tap into increased digital consumption. For example, DPG Media in Belgium recently set up its own streaming platform, Streamz, to offer a local alternative to foreign streaming services. Media companies are also differentiating more in their subscription offering. For instance, Videoland now offers a cheaper package because it also contains advertising. Media spending is also expected to increase again in 2021, which gives extra scope to strengthen propositions further.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0020

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0021
text: For example, DPG Media in Belgium recently set up its own streaming platform, Streamz, to offer a local alternative to foreign streaming services. Media companies are also differentiating more in their subscription offering. For instance, Videoland now offers a cheaper package because it also contains advertising. Media spending is also expected to increase again in 2021, which gives extra scope to strengthen propositions further. The shift to online is not new.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0021
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0022
text: Media companies are also differentiating more in their subscription offering. For instance, Videoland now offers a cheaper package because it also contains advertising. Media spending is also expected to increase again in 2021, which gives extra scope to strengthen propositions further. The shift to online is not new. Media companies have been working on online propositions for years, but due to strong competition from Google and Facebook in the advertising market and the wide availability of free content, it is difficult to make money from this.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0022
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0023
text: For instance, Videoland now offers a cheaper package because it also contains advertising. Media spending is also expected to increase again in 2021, which gives extra scope to strengthen propositions further. The shift to online is not new. Media companies have been working on online propositions for years, but due to strong competition from Google and Facebook in the advertising market and the wide availability of free content, it is difficult to make money from this. However, the call to curb the market power of these tech giants is growing louder.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0023
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0024
text: Media spending is also expected to increase again in 2021, which gives extra scope to strengthen propositions further. The shift to online is not new. Media companies have been working on online propositions for years, but due to strong competition from Google and Facebook in the advertising market and the wide availability of free content, it is difficult to make money from this. However, the call to curb the market power of these tech giants is growing louder. The first concrete steps will soon be taken at European level.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0024
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0025
text: The shift to online is not new. Media companies have been working on online propositions for years, but due to strong competition from Google and Facebook in the advertising market and the wide availability of free content, it is difficult to make money from this. However, the call to curb the market power of these tech giants is growing louder. The first concrete steps will soon be taken at European level. A new European directive to be published in June this year should ensure that publishers gain more control over the use of their articles by Google and Facebook and can, if necessary, enforce payment for this.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0025
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0026
text: Media companies have been working on online propositions for years, but due to strong competition from Google and Facebook in the advertising market and the wide availability of free content, it is difficult to make money from this. However, the call to curb the market power of these tech giants is growing louder. The first concrete steps will soon be taken at European level. A new European directive to be published in June this year should ensure that publishers gain more control over the use of their articles by Google and Facebook and can, if necessary, enforce payment for this. This gives publishers’ online revenue model a helping hand.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0026
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0027
text: However, the call to curb the market power of these tech giants is growing louder. The first concrete steps will soon be taken at European level. A new European directive to be published in June this year should ensure that publishers gain more control over the use of their articles by Google and Facebook and can, if necessary, enforce payment for this. This gives publishers’ online revenue model a helping hand. Advertising agencies have also responded quickly over the past year to increased digital consumption.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0027
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0028
text: The first concrete steps will soon be taken at European level. A new European directive to be published in June this year should ensure that publishers gain more control over the use of their articles by Google and Facebook and can, if necessary, enforce payment for this. This gives publishers’ online revenue model a helping hand. Advertising agencies have also responded quickly over the past year to increased digital consumption. Due to the lockdowns, consumers have been buying even more online.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0028
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0029
text: A new European directive to be published in June this year should ensure that publishers gain more control over the use of their articles by Google and Facebook and can, if necessary, enforce payment for this. This gives publishers’ online revenue model a helping hand. Advertising agencies have also responded quickly over the past year to increased digital consumption. Due to the lockdowns, consumers have been buying even more online. As a result, advertising campaigns have increasingly shifted to the internet.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0029
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0030
text: This gives publishers’ online revenue model a helping hand. Advertising agencies have also responded quickly over the past year to increased digital consumption. Due to the lockdowns, consumers have been buying even more online. As a result, advertising campaigns have increasingly shifted to the internet. During the first lockdown in spring 2020, a very different route still seemed to be taken; campaigns were then withdrawn or postponed en masse due to economic uncertainty.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0030
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0031
text: Advertising agencies have also responded quickly over the past year to increased digital consumption. Due to the lockdowns, consumers have been buying even more online. As a result, advertising campaigns have increasingly shifted to the internet. During the first lockdown in spring 2020, a very different route still seemed to be taken; campaigns were then withdrawn or postponed en masse due to economic uncertainty. Advertising agencies therefore faced a sharp fall in revenue.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0031
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0032
text: Due to the lockdowns, consumers have been buying even more online. As a result, advertising campaigns have increasingly shifted to the internet. During the first lockdown in spring 2020, a very different route still seemed to be taken; campaigns were then withdrawn or postponed en masse due to economic uncertainty. Advertising agencies therefore faced a sharp fall in revenue. The fact that the current lockdown is being felt less does not mean that advertising agencies are free of concern.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0032
metadata.source_slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
metadata.source_title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0033
text: As a result, advertising campaigns have increasingly shifted to the internet. During the first lockdown in spring 2020, a very different route still seemed to be taken; campaigns were then withdrawn or postponed en masse due to economic uncertainty. Advertising agencies therefore faced a sharp fall in revenue. The fact that the current lockdown is being felt less does not mean that advertising agencies are free of concern. As long as shops remain closed, people do not travel and events do not take place, media budgets will remain at a lower level.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0034
text: During the first lockdown in spring 2020, a very different route still seemed to be taken; campaigns were then withdrawn or postponed en masse due to economic uncertainty. Advertising agencies therefore faced a sharp fall in revenue. The fact that the current lockdown is being felt less does not mean that advertising agencies are free of concern. As long as shops remain closed, people do not travel and events do not take place, media budgets will remain at a lower level. Strong growth in the IT industry.

As long as shops remain closed, people do not travel and events do not take place, media budgets will remain at a lower level. Strong growth in the IT industry. Not only in media companies and advertising agencies, but also in other sectors, the coronavirus crisis has accelerated the digital transformation; for example in health care and education.

For the entire TMT sector, the outlook is particularly good for the second half of this year. Because a large part of the vulnerable population is then expected to be vaccinated, the restrictive measures will by then have been largely lifted.

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0043
text: The digitalisation of society continues unabated, which means that companies in all sectors will continue to rely on the technology sector. TMT sector to grow in 2021. For the entire TMT sector, the outlook is particularly good for the second half of this year. Because a large part of the vulnerable population is then expected to be vaccinated, the restrictive measures will by then have been largely lifted. This will cause media budgets in hard-hit sectors such as travel and events to grow substantially again, business investment to increase and consumer confidence to rise.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0043

text: TMT sector to grow in 2021. For the entire TMT sector, the outlook is particularly good for the second half of this year. Because a large part of the vulnerable population is then expected to be vaccinated, the restrictive measures will by then have been largely lifted. This will cause media budgets in hard-hit sectors such as travel and events to grow substantially again, business investment to increase and consumer confidence to rise. After growth stagnated in 2020, the TMT sector will grow again as a result.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0044

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0045
text: For the entire TMT sector, the outlook is particularly good for the second half of this year. Because a large part of the vulnerable population is then expected to be vaccinated, the restrictive measures will by then have been largely lifted. This will cause media budgets in hard-hit sectors such as travel and events to grow substantially again, business investment to increase and consumer confidence to rise. After growth stagnated in 2020, the TMT sector will grow again as a result. ABN AMRO expects growth of 3 per cent in 2021.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0045

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0046
text: Because a large part of the vulnerable population is then expected to be vaccinated, the restrictive measures will by then have been largely lifted. This will cause media budgets in hard-hit sectors such as travel and events to grow substantially again, business investment to increase and consumer confidence to rise. After growth stagnated in 2020, the TMT sector will grow again as a result. ABN AMRO expects growth of 3 per cent in 2021. This growth is driven primarily by rising demand for IT services, by far the largest branch within the TMT sector.

metadata.chunk_id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0046

id: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei__c5-sentence-window__0047
text: This will cause media budgets in hard-hit sectors such as travel and events to grow substantially again, business investment to increase and consumer confidence to rise. After growth stagnated in 2020, the TMT sector will grow again as a result. ABN AMRO expects growth of 3 per cent in 2021. This growth is driven primarily by rising demand for IT services, by far the largest branch within the TMT sector. But the recovery of publishers, broadcasters, printers and the advertising industry compared with the low year of 2020 will also contribute.

text: After growth stagnated in 2020, the TMT sector will grow again as a result. ABN AMRO expects growth of 3 per cent in 2021. This growth is driven primarily by rising demand for IT services, by far the largest branch within the TMT sector. But the recovery of publishers, broadcasters, printers and the advertising industry compared with the low year of 2020 will also contribute. As a result, the sector will once again be well above the level of end-2019.

text: ABN AMRO expects growth of 3 per cent in 2021. This growth is driven primarily by rising demand for IT services, by far the largest branch within the TMT sector. But the recovery of publishers, broadcasters, printers and the advertising industry compared with the low year of 2020 will also contribute. As a result, the sector will once again be well above the level of end-2019. However, due to uncertainty about the course of the coronavirus, these expectations are surrounded by considerable uncertainty.
